category_sources: Official Scalastyle site at http://www.scalastyle.org/ describes checking Scala code for style and potential problems.
source_facts.description: Run scalastyle from the command-line.
display_name_sources: Official site at http://www.scalastyle.org/ uses Scalastyle.
docs_sources: Official Scalastyle website provides configuration and rules documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official command-line documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official Scalastyle project source-control location: https://github.com/scalastyle/scalastyle.
tags_sources: Official Scalastyle documentation describes style checking for Scala code.
source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify the command-line scalastyle tool.
